labels.analysis: The MCP Server "com.robtex/mcp" provides 49 tools focused on dns & networking tasks. Core capabilities include creation and generation, data access and reading, search and retrieval. Key tools: latest_lightning_channels, ip_reputation, lookup_dns, reverse_lookup_dns_records, reverse_lookup_mx.
labels.reasoning: Primary label "DNS & Networking" assigned based on strong keyword matches in tool names and descriptions: dns, domain, whois, ip_, network, nameserver.

tools.name: latest_lightning_channels
tools.description: Returns the most recently opened Lightning Network channels, sorted by open time descending.

tools.name: ip_reputation
tools.description: Check an IP address reputation against 100+ real-time blocklists (DNSBLs). Returns listing status, threat categories, AS info, and blocklist details.

ip.description: IPv4 or IPv6 address to check (e.g., 8.8.8.8, 2001:4860:4860::8888)

tools.name: lookup_dns
tools.description: Lookup DNS records (A, AAAA, MX, NS, TXT, CNAME, SOA) for a given hostname. Also returns domain reputation info (Majestic, Tranco rankings, blocklist status).

hostname.description: Hostname or domain to lookup (e.g., example.com, www.example.com)

tools.name: reverse_lookup_dns_records
tools.description: Find hostnames that use a specific DNS record value. Query which hostnames point to an IP address, use a particular nameserver, or reference any DNS value. For example: 'which hostnames point to 1.2.3.4?' or 'which hostnames use chris.ns.cloudflare.com as their nameserver?'

value.description: The DNS record value to search for (e.g., IP address, nameserver hostname, mail server, CNAME target)

record_type.description: Type of DNS record to search (A, AAAA, NS, MX, CNAME, TXT)

limit.description: Maximum number of hostnames to return

tools.name: reverse_lookup_mx
tools.description: Find hostnames that use a specific mail server. For example: which hostnames use aspmx.l.google.com as their mail server?

mx_server.description: The mail server hostname to search for (e.g., aspmx.l.google.com, mx1.example.com)

limit.description: Maximum number of hostnames to return

tools.name: reverse_lookup_ns
tools.description: Find hostnames that use a specific nameserver. For example: which hostnames use chris.ns.cloudflare.com as their nameserver?

nameserver.description: The nameserver hostname to search for (e.g., chris.ns.cloudflare.com, ns1.example.com)

limit.description: Maximum number of hostnames to return

tools.name: reverse_lookup_ip
tools.description: Find hostnames that point to a specific IP address (IPv4 or IPv6). Searches both A and AAAA records. For example: which hostnames point to 1.2.3.4?

ip.description: The IP address to search for (IPv4 or IPv6)

limit.description: Maximum number of hostnames to return

tools.name: historic_reverse_lookup_ns
tools.description: Find hostnames that *previously* used a specific nameserver but no longer do. Tracks infrastructure migrations and past delegation relationships.

nameserver.description: The nameserver hostname to search for (e.g., chris.ns.cloudflare.com, ns1.example.com)

limit.description: Maximum number of hostnames to return

tools.name: historic_reverse_lookup_mx
tools.description: Find hostnames that *previously* used a specific mail server but no longer do. Tracks email provider migrations and past MX relationships.

mx_server.description: The mail server hostname to search for (e.g., aspmx.l.google.com, mx1.example.com)

limit.description: Maximum number of hostnames to return

tools.name: historic_reverse_lookup_ip
tools.description: Find hostnames that *previously* pointed to a specific IP address but no longer do. Tracks hosting migrations and past IP relationships. Searches both A and AAAA records.

ip.description: The IP address to search for (IPv4 or IPv6)

limit.description: Maximum number of hostnames to return

tools.name: lookup_mac
tools.description: Look up the manufacturer/vendor of a network device by its MAC address. Uses the official IEEE OUI (Organizationally Unique Identifier) database with ~30K entries.

mac_address.description: MAC address to look up (e.g., D8:A3:5C:12:34:56, D8-A3-5C-12-34-56, or D8A35C123456). Only the first 6 hex characters (OUI prefix) are used.

tools.name: lookup_as_whois
tools.description: Lookup WHOIS information for an Autonomous System (AS) number from the RADB routing database. Returns routing policy, network information, and administrative contacts.

asn.description: AS number to lookup (e.g., "AS15169" or "15169" for Google)

tools.name: lookup_lightning_node
tools.description: Lookup a Lightning Network node by public key. Returns node alias, peer count, channel count, and centrality ranking.

pubkey.description: Compressed secp256k1 public key (66 hex chars)

tools.name: lookup_lightning_channel
tools.description: Lookup a Lightning channel by channel ID. Supports numeric, block x txn x vout, or block:txn:vout formats.

channel_id.description: Lightning channel ID (numeric, blockxtxnxvout, or block:txn:vout format)

tools.name: lookup_lightning_channels_per_node
tools.description: Lookup all Lightning Network channels for a given node by public key.

node.description: Compressed secp256k1 public key (66 hex chars)

limit.description: Maximum number of channels to return

tools.name: get_recommended_lightning_peers
tools.description: Get recommended Lightning Network peers for a given node. Returns nodes that are NOT currently peered with the specified node but would improve its centrality score if connected.

pubkey.description: Compressed secp256k1 public key (66 hex chars)

limit.description: Maximum number of recommended peers to return

tools.name: search_lightning_nodes_by_alias
tools.description: Search for Lightning Network nodes by partial alias match. Returns nodes whose aliases contain the search term (case-insensitive).

alias.description: Search term to match against node aliases

limit.description: Maximum number of nodes to return

tools.name: ipquery
tools.description: Returns network info, geolocation, and DNS records for an IP address.

tools.name: asquery
tools.description: Returns networks associated with an AS number.

tools.name: pdns_forward
tools.description: Returns passive DNS records for a domain (A, AAAA, MX, NS, CNAME).

tools.name: pdns_reverse
tools.description: Returns domains that reference a given value. Use type=a (default) for IP, type=ns for nameserver, type=mx for mail server.

value.description: IP address, nameserver, or mail server hostname

tools.name: pdns_reverse_historic
tools.description: Returns domains that previously referenced a given value but no longer do. Use type=a (default) for IP, type=ns for nameserver, type=mx for mail server.

value.description: IP address, nameserver, or mail server hostname

tools.name: parse_hostname
tools.description: Parse a hostname into its constituent parts using the Mozilla Public Suffix List (9700+ entries). Returns eTLD (effective TLD), registered domain, subdomain, labels, and depth. Handles multi-level eTLDs (co.uk, co.jp, com.au) and platform suffixes (github.io, herokuapp.com).

tools.name: is_subdomain
tools.description: Check whether a hostname is a subdomain (has labels beyond the registered domain). Uses the Mozilla Public Suffix List for accurate eTLD detection.

tools.name: registered_domain
tools.description: Extract the registered domain (eTLD+1) from a hostname. For example, www.mail.example.co.uk returns example.co.uk.

hostname.description: Hostname to extract registered domain from

tools.name: tld_info
tools.description: Get information about a top-level domain or effective TLD. Returns whether it is in the Public Suffix List, how many sub-suffixes exist, and classification (ccTLD, gTLD, or infrastructure).

tld.description: TLD or eTLD to look up (e.g. "uk", "co.uk", "github.io")

tools.name: reverse_lookup_cname
tools.description: Find hostnames that have a CNAME record pointing to the specified target. Useful for CDN and load balancer investigations.

limit.description: Max results

tools.name: historic_reverse_lookup_cname
tools.description: Find hostnames that previously had a CNAME record pointing to the specified target but no longer do. Tracks CDN and infrastructure migrations.

limit.description: Max results

tools.name: ip_geolocation
tools.description: Get geographic location data for an IP address: country, city, region, latitude, longitude, timezone.

tools.name: ip_network
tools.description: Get the containing network (BGP route), AS number, AS name, and route description for an IP address.

tools.name: ip_to_asn
tools.description: Lightweight lookup: get just the AS number and netblock for an IP address. Fastest way to map IP to ASN.

tools.name: ip_blocklist_check
tools.description: Check an IP address against IPsum, FireHOL, Tor exit node lists, C2 indicators, and other threat intelligence feeds. Returns which lists the IP appears on and threat scores.

ip.description: IPv4 or IPv6 address to check

tools.name: ip_threat_intel
tools.description: Combined threat intelligence: DNSBL listings, IPsum score, FireHOL lists, bad ASN flag, Tor exit status. Comprehensive threat assessment for an IP address.

tools.name: as_info
tools.description: Get the name, organization, country, and description for an Autonomous System number. Lightweight version of as_whois.

tools.name: as_prefixes
tools.description: Get all IPv4 and IPv6 network prefixes (netblocks) announced by an Autonomous System. Returns BGP-visible routes.

tools.name: domain_reputation
tools.description: Get comprehensive domain reputation: Majestic rank, Tranco rank, HaGeZi blocklist status, Blackbook malware status, phishing database status, HSTS preload status, and disposable email detection.

tools.name: domain_ranking
tools.description: Get domain popularity rankings from five independent sources: Majestic Million (backlinks), Tranco top 1M (aggregated traffic), Cloudflare Radar (1.1.1.1 DNS query popularity), Cisco Umbrella (OpenDNS query popularity), and Chrome UX Report (real Chrome user traffic).

tools.name: domain_blocklist_check
tools.description: Check a domain against HaGeZi DNS blocklists, Steven Black unified hosts, Blackbook malware list, and phishing databases. Returns which lists the domain appears on.

tools.name: domain_shared_ip
tools.description: Find other domains hosted on the same IP address(es) as the target domain. Resolves the domain's A records, then performs reverse IP lookups for each.

limit.description: Max results per IP

tools.name: domain_shared_ns
tools.description: Find other domains using the same nameserver(s) as the target domain. Resolves the domain's NS records, then performs reverse NS lookups for each.

limit.description: Max results per NS

tools.name: domain_shared_mx
tools.description: Find other domains using the same mail server(s) as the target domain. Resolves the domain's MX records, then performs reverse MX lookups for each.

limit.description: Max results per MX

tools.name: check_email
tools.description: Verify an email address by connecting to its mail server via SMTP. Checks MX records, tests if the address is accepted (RCPT TO), detects catch-all domains, and reports TLS support. Results are RAM-cached for 1 hour.

tools.name: ping
tools.description: Check if the API is responding. Returns status and server timestamp.

tools.name: lookup_bitcoin_transaction
tools.description: Returns full transaction details: inputs with addresses and values, outputs with spent status, fee, size/weight, SegWit flag, and Lightning Network channel correlation. Supports both confirmed and mempool transactions.

tools.name: lookup_bitcoin_address
tools.description: Returns address balance, total received/sent, transaction counts, address type (P2PKH, P2SH, P2WPKH, P2TR), first/last seen block, and ransomware/abuse flags. Supports all Bitcoin address formats.

tools.name: lookup_bitcoin_block
tools.description: Returns block header (hash, timestamp, version, merkle root, difficulty, nonce), transaction count, and list of transaction IDs. Supports lookup by block height.

tools.name: bitcoin_address_transactions
tools.description: Returns a paginated list of transactions involving a Bitcoin address. Filter by direction: received (incoming funds), sent (outgoing funds), or all. Returns up to 100 transactions per call, sorted by block height descending (most recent first).

tools.name: bitcoin_transaction_spends
tools.description: For a given transaction, returns which subsequent transactions consumed its outputs. Useful for UTXO tracking and chain analysis. Shows the spending txid for each output.

tools.name: bitcoin_blockchain_stats
tools.description: Returns cumulative blockchain metrics over a configurable block range. Available metrics include: txs, fees, segwittx, inputs, outputs, insats, outsats, btcusd, volusd, unspentoutputs, fullyspent, unspentsats, addresses, satoshiblocks, clnopen, clnclose, satlnopen, satlnclose, basereward, blockreward, batched, rbf, version2tx, lowestfee, and more. Returns sampled data points suitable for charting.

metric.description: Metric name (e.g., txs, fees, segwittx, btcusd, clnopen)

samples.description: Number of data points to return (evenly spaced across range)
